title: Tom Sawyers Abenteuer und Streiche
summaries: "Tom Sawyers Abenteuer und Streiche" by Mark Twain is a novel published in 1876. It follows young Tom Sawyer growing up along the Mississippi River in the 1830s-1840s. From whitewashing fences to midnight graveyard rituals, Tom's mischievous adventures take a darker turn when he witnesses a murder. Alongside his friend Huckleberry Finn, Tom navigates childhood romance, pirate fantasies, and dangerous secrets involving treasure and revenge in the fictional town of St. Petersburg.
